prompt: A full-body fantasy anime-style illustration of a glamorous young idol-like woman performing on an ornate gilded stage inside a grand baroque palace hall. She stands in a dramatic low-angle pose on a carved gold balcony or platform, one leg forward and slightly crossed, with her left arm thrust toward the viewer in strong foreshortening and her other hand resting lightly at her chest. She has a slim, elegant build, very long flowing dark brown hair streaming in the air, and a decorative floral and ribbon headpiece. Her expression should feel confident, theatrical, and captivating. She wears an elaborate frilled performance dress in royal blue, crimson red, white, and gold: a fitted corset bodice with gold trim and red front panel, white lace bust and sleeves, layered short ruffled skirt, and large swirling overskirts and cape-like fabric panels edged with gold embroidery that billow dramatically around her. Add ornate ankle accessories with matching ribbon flowers, white heeled shoes or short boots, and luxurious detailed fabric textures. The setting is a richly decorated interior with 1 large glowing gothic arched window on the left, 1 heavy dark red velvet curtain framing the top and left side, 1 large classical oil painting in an ornate frame on the right wall, 1 tall carved column behind her, 1 abundant arrangement of roses and pale flowers at the lower left, and 1 gilded balustrade across the foreground. Warm golden backlight streams through the stained-glass-like window, creating a luminous halo, soft haze, rim light on her hair and costume, and deep cinematic shadows. A few rose petals drift in the air. Highly detailed, ultra-polished, romantic, majestic, dynamic composition, rich textures, painterly anime illustration with realistic lighting and luxurious fantasy idol aesthetics.
